purpose: Adjust nominal voltage Un to account for normal supply variation (tap changing, no-load TX secondary, regulation drops)

lv_systems_ge_100v._scope: Three-phase LV: 230/400 V (IEC), 277/480 V (NEC). Single-phase LV: 230 V (IEC), 120/240 V (NEC).

c_max.use_for: Calculation of maximum Ik" — drives breaker breaking-capacity verification + busbar Ipk withstand check
c_max.rationale: Accounts for normal over-voltage at lightly loaded transformer secondary

c_min.use_for: Calculation of minimum Ik" — drives ADS (automatic disconnection of supply) protection setting verification
c_min.rationale: Accounts for under-voltage at heavily loaded transformer + cable drop

mv_hv_systems._scope: Un > 1 kV up to 230 kV (11 kV, 33 kV, 132 kV typical)

engineering_application.for_breaker_selection: Always use c_max for Ik"_max — under-sizing a breaker on c=1.0 is unsafe
engineering_application.for_protection_setting: Use c_min for Ik"_min — over-setting protection on c=1.0 can leave faults unprotected (ADS fails)
engineering_application.for_selectivity_coordination: Use c_max for upstream Icn check, c_min for downstream sensitivity check
